finding_results.notes: Reworked the late Rafe/Della exchange so it no longer repeats the earlier money-versus-truth beat. The scene now turns to immediate household fallout, road gossip reaching Ruthie and June, and Della's need to tell the withheld truth before the valley does.
finding_results.summary: The post-climax coda now introduces new consequence and presses the chapter toward the chapter 14 confession instead of replaying the same grievance.

summary: Revised chapter 13 in place and resolved the packet's craft issue by giving the late mother-son exchange fresh stakes tied to household exposure and the coming confession.
